roles.title: SDE Intern
highlights: Built a Log Ingestion Proxy using Python, OpenTelemetry (OTLP), and SigNoz with a modular backend, reducing debugging time by 50%.
Improved platform reliability by fixing frontend issues and building reusable UI components for an internal npm registry using Storybook.
Designed an automated CI pipeline to publish a widget repository to internal Artifactory with testing, linting, type-checking, changesets, and build; reducing manual deployment effort by 80%.

roles.title: Software Engineering Intern
highlights: Developed a Rule Definition Engine with a form-based UI, reducing task allotment time for candidates by 75%.
Implemented frontend using ReactJS and integrated with a Spring Boot backend for rule execution.

company: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (CDAC)
